title: Naïve B cells with low differentiation improve the immune reconstitution of HIV-infected patients
author: Jie Jia
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: Single-cell RNA sequencing for peripheral blood mononuclear cells (PBMCs) to analyze BCR repertoire and B cell subtypes in health controls (non-HIV-infected, HCs), HIV-infected immunological-responders (IRs) and immunological non-responders (INRs).
steps_raw: Single-cell RNA sequencing for peripheral blood mononuclear cells (PBMCs) to analyze BCR repertoire and B cell subtypes in health controls (non-HIV-infected, HCs), HIV-infected immunological-responders (IRs) and immunological non-responders (INRs).
